name: circuit
description: Structured, resumable developer flows for Claude Code. /circuit:run is the default intent front door for natural-language coding tasks. Direct flow commands such as /circuit:explore, /circuit:review, /circuit:fix, and /circuit:build are expert controls when you already know the flow; Pursue is routable through /circuit:run and direct CLI flow invocation. /circuit:create and /circuit:handoff cover custom flows and continuity.
